name: Web Design
prompts: Create a website themed 'AI Development Trends · 2025-2026 Latest Trend Analysis'. The visuals follow Linear aesthetics with an engineering, cool, austere style. Content covers six core slices: the leap to Agent-ization, the collapse of inference costs, multimodal fusion, the explosion of on-device intelligence, deep cultivation of vertical industries, and governance and alignment. Include a set of key data (market size, enterprise adoption rate, annual decline in Token prices), a simplified diagram of the China-US-EU tripolar landscape, and five key predictions for 2026 (labeled with high/medium/low confidence). Data sources refer to Stanford HAI, McKinsey, a16z, Gartner, and IDC via online search.

Design a sneaker culture introduction website page, including a Hero section, a timeline of iconic sneaker evolution, street culture stories, and signature brand collaborations — streetwear, bold, and full of attitude.

Design a creative design website page from a Neo-Brutalism designer's perspective, combining brutalism's hard edges with saturated candy color blocks, bold outlines, and offset shadows. Visual design concept: thick borders, large rounded corners or hard-angled blocks, saturated pink/yellow/blue/green, bold sans-serif or monospace fonts; prominent offset shadows. Use sticker/hand-drawn elements to add playfulness while keeping layout divisions clear. Material and texture: solid fills, noise/stripe backgrounds, sticker/graffiti symbols; shadows are short but with clear offset, borders 2-4px. Avoid excessive glass and gradients. Overall mood: bold, playful yet orderly, like an interface made of colorful building blocks.

name: PPT Design
prompts: Create a 6-page PPT introducing Minecraft, with a cool and rich pixel-style layout and a pixel-themed design style.

Help me generate a set of launch event slide mockups for a Chinese-style wuxia open-world exploration game, including 6 main pages. The layout should be large and suitable for big-screen playback at the venue. Boldly use SVG decorations on the slides, keep page elements rich and refined, and showcase the game's art design, UI design, rich content, and other elements. Use 'ai' mode wherever images need to be generated.

Create a master's thesis defense PPT, 10 pages total, in a rigorous academic style. The main colors use dark navy (#0F172A) for titles, charcoal gray (#334155) for body text, and academic red (#B91C1C) to highlight key findings, with a pure white background. The page structure is: cover, research background and significance, literature review, research questions and hypotheses, research methodology, experimental design, data analysis, main conclusions, limitations and future work, and acknowledgments. Charts use classic black-white-gray colors, with no gradients. Each page has a chapter number in the top-right corner to help the defense committee navigate quickly. Chinese fonts use SimSun; English uses Times New Roman. The footer includes the school logo, name, student ID, and date. The overall feel is restrained and professional, highlighting the academic value of the research.

Create a 10-page internal research PPT presentation on 'Humanoid Robots 2026'. Requirements: conduct online searches to gather the latest trends and developments in the humanoid robotics field, with a focus on the latest progress and breakthroughs in embodied intelligence; analyze the transition of humanoid robots from laboratory R&D to real factory deployment; and integrate rich, reliable data visualization charts covering market forecasts, technology comparisons, application scenarios, and more. The result should be a complete research deliverable suitable for internal reporting. Use a Titanium gray visual style: #1C1C1E titanium black + #A1A1AA silver gray + #F59E0B warm-gold accents — overall industrial, precise, and rigorous.

Create an investment pitch PPT for an Omakase Japanese cuisine franchise, 10 pages total, in a 'Wabi-sabi aesthetic × Extreme negative space' style. Use rice-white washi paper color (#F5F0E8) as the main background, with ink black (#1A1A1A) and cinnabar red (#B8292E) accents in key positions. Negative space occupies more than 70% of each page; text is sparse and restrained, often with just a single line plus a stamp-like mark per page. The cover features only a hand-brushed calligraphy character '鮨' (in cinnabar red) in the bottom-left corner, with a vertical line of small text in the top-right noting the brand name — the rest is blank. Titles use a Japanese calligraphy style mixing kana and kanji; body text uses an ultra-thin sans-serif. All divider lines are replaced with hand-drawn ink brushstrokes. Data pages break conventional charts, presenting key numbers as haiku-style short phrases arranged vertically, such as '一期一会 / 八席 / 三十六道'. The franchise policy page unfolds as a Japanese scroll, read from right to left. Image placeholders use Japanese square-seal styles and irregular ink-blot shapes (labeled 'Dish Photo', 'Chef Portrait'). The overall feel is tranquil, restrained, and zen-like, conveying brand tone over information density.

Create a PPT for an AI hardware product launch event, 10 pages total, in a 'Minimalist Futurism × Dieter Rams homage' style. Use pure light gray-white (#F5F5F7) as the main background, near-black (#1D1D1F) for text, and the product's signature bright orange (#FF5C1A) as the sole accent color used only for key data. The entire deck follows the 'less is more' principle: each page has at most 7 characters as the title, with body text under 20 characters. The cover shows only the three-letter product name 'ORB' centered, at a font size occupying 1/3 of the screen height, with a small '2026 - 04 - 15' line below. The product showcase page uses a fully centered single-element composition: the product image placeholder is a perfect circle at the center (labeled 'Product Hero Shot'), surrounded by abundant breathing space, with a small model number line at the bottom. The spec comparison page uses ultra-fine 1px divider lines to split the page into an equal grid, with each cell containing only one number and one word (such as '12h' and 'Battery Life'). The overall feel is calm, premium, and full of breathing space, making the product itself the sole protagonist.

name: Visual Posters
prompts: Help me design a promotional poster for a product launch event with the theme of AI innovation, size 1080x1920, highlighting the launch date and product highlights.
Design a set of e-commerce Banners for the Double 11 sales event, 3 banners in different sizes with a unified style, emphasizing discount information and a limited-time flash sale atmosphere.
Design an event poster for a tech summit, highlighting the headshots of three speakers, the event time and location, and the registration QR code.

name: Mobile App
prompts: Design a fitness App. Create a complete user registration flow and a workout data dashboard page for a fitness tracking App, with charts that display daily exercise data.
Referencing Xiaohongshu's (Little Red Book) design style, help me design a discovery page for a content community App, featuring a waterfall card layout and search/filter functionality.

Design a youth-oriented city check-in social App called 'CityGo' with a bold, vibrant, Y2K retro-futuristic style. The primary colors are fluorescent green, electric purple, and bright yellow, with extensive use of bold sans-serif fonts and irregular sticker elements. The home page features a city map scattered with bubbles marking user-captured check-in spots; tapping a bubble opens a 3x3 photo grid. The post interface supports adding hand-drawn doodles, stickers, and glitch-art filters to photos. All buttons are large rounded pill shapes with a bouncy tap animation. The overall feel is like a digital doodle-and-sticker book.

name: Design System
prompts: Help me build a complete Design System, including a color system, typography hierarchy, spacing rules, and foundational component specification documentation.
Referencing Ant Design's style, design a component library specification for my admin management system, including button, form, table, and modal components.
Create a Design Token system for a mobile App that supports light/dark theme switching, and output a complete variable table for colors, border radii, and shadows.

name: Web App
prompts: Design a complete interface for a project management WebApp, including a dashboard overview, task kanban, team member management, and project settings pages. Style inspired by Linear — clean and efficient.

Design a resume-building Web App called 'Resume.io' with a clean, efficient, WYSIWYG style. Use a split-screen layout: the left side is the form editing area (collapsible panels for personal info, education, work experience, skills, etc.), and the right side displays a live preview of an A4-sized resume (with realistic shadows). The top bar allows switching between 6 template styles (minimalist black-and-white, business blue, designer colorful, academic serif, etc.), and the top-right corner has 'Download PDF' and 'Share Link' buttons. The preview on the right updates in real time as users edit, with modified fields briefly highlighted. The overall goal is to let users produce a high-quality resume within 10 minutes.

Design a SaaS data analytics platform WebApp interface, including data source connections, a visualization chart editor, report generation, and permission management modules. Professional business color scheme.

name: Brand Design
prompts: Design a tech-style brand Logo with deep blue as the primary color, suitable for an AI product. It should be simple and recognizable, and also provide standard color values and usage guidelines.
Design a complete visual identity system for my coffee brand, including Logo, color palette, typography guidelines, and business card style, with a warm and artistic style.
Referencing the design styles of Apple and Stripe, design the brand identity for my SaaS product, including the main Logo, icon variations, and brand color palette.

name: Icons & Illustrations
prompts: Help me design a set of 24 linear-style general-purpose icons suitable for an admin management system, covering common scenarios such as Home, Users, Settings, and Data.
Design a set of cute-style illustrated icons for a children's education App, covering 12 scenes across the themes of reading, math, music, and science.
Design a set of flat-style financial icons covering 16 scenarios such as payment, billing, wallet, transfer, and wealth management, with a unified color scheme.
